source_pr.title: expression: support push down tikv supported functions
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: yisaer <disxiaofei@163.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/31846

### What is changed and how it works?

push following functions down to TiKV, they are already supported in TiKV accoriding to https://github.com/tikv/tikv/issues/5751

date:

* Date / Week / YearWeek / ToSeconds / DateDiff 
* MonthName / MakeDate / TimeToSec / MakeTime

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

fix_pattern: expression: support push down tikv supported functions
